recommendations.title: Vincent N Roxxy
recommendations.overview: A small town loner and a rebellious punk rocker unexpectedly fall in love as they are forced on the run and soon discover violence follows them everywhere.

recommendations.title: Vada Chennai
recommendations.overview: Anbu, a young carrom player in North Chennai becomes inadvertently involved in an ongoing conflict between two local gangsters.

recommendations.title: A Wolf at the Door
recommendations.overview: Love turns to hate and panic breeds suspicion as two parents deal with the kidnapping of their child.

recommendations.title: The Quarry
recommendations.overview: A man on the run from his own sins, finds himself in a small border town in Texas, impersonating a reverend. The town are quickly drawn to the man's unorthodox sermons, but so is a police chief who has his suspicions.

recommendations.title: Marvin's Room
recommendations.overview: A leukemia patient attempts to end a 20-year feud with her sister to get her bone marrow.

recommendations.title: Romeo + Juliet
recommendations.overview: In this contemporary take on William Shakespeare's classic tragedy, the Montagues and Capulets have moved their ongoing feud to the sweltering suburb of Verona Beach, where Romeo and Juliet fall in love and secretly wed. Though the film is visually m

recommendations.title: Dead Man's Shoes
recommendations.overview: A soldier returns to his small town and exacts a deadly revenge on the thugs who tormented his disabled brother while he was away.

recommendations.title: Jawbreaker
recommendations.overview: When an exclusive clique of teenage socialites accidentally murder their best friend on the morning of her birthday, the three girls responsible conspire to hide the truth.

recommendations.title: The Bandit
recommendations.overview: Baran the Bandit, released from prison after serving 35 years, searches for vengeance against his former best friend who betrayed him and stole his lover, teaming up with a young punk with his own demons along the way.

recommendations.title: Blood Simple
recommendations.overview: The owner of a seedy small-town Texas bar discovers that one of his employees is having an affair with his wife. A chaotic chain of misunderstandings, lies and mischief ensues after he devises a plot to have them murdered.
